countingModel.issueType: Exact status, code and message tuple

countingModel.summaryRecords: Not generated and not counted as independent issues

partialCodeCoverage.xml_xsd: Only the EBU-TT-D head child-order constraint is implemented. Other XSD failures remain unknown.
